subject: Charged twice for subscription
body: I was charged $49.99 twice on my credit card this month. I only have one account. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.

subject: Cannot access my account
body: I have been trying to log in for the past hour. Password reset emails are not arriving. I have an important deadline today.

subject: API returning 500 errors
body: Our integration keeps getting 500 Internal Server Error responses when sending POST requests to /api/v2/webhooks. Started happening after your maintenance window last night.

subject: Request for bulk export feature
body: It would be really helpful if we could export all our project data in bulk as a CSV. Currently we have to export one project at a time which is very time consuming.

subject: Slow dashboard loading times
body: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load every morning. It used to load in 2-3 seconds. This has been going on for about a week now.

subject: Thank you for the quick support
body: Just wanted to say thanks to your support team. My issue was resolved within an hour. Really impressed with the service.

subject: Invoice shows wrong company name
body: Our invoice for March shows the wrong company name. It says TechFlow but should be TechFlow Solutions Inc. We need this corrected for our accounting records.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
body: The 2FA codes from my authenticator app are being rejected. I have verified the time sync on my phone is correct. Cannot access my account at all.
